title: Deep Conditioning Treatment and Blow Dry with Optional Haircut with MILBON Products (Up to 55% Off)

pricing_options.label: Haircut, Deep Conditioning  treatment, and Blow Dry

highlights_html: Highly-trained and professional stylist, will have you looking amazing. You will be satisfied and feeling great.
highlights_text: Highly-trained and professional stylist, will have you looking amazing. You will be satisfied and feeling great.
about_deal_html:
Get ready for a hair transformation! Enjoy a luxurious experience with a MILBON Japanese deep conditioning treatment, a fresh haircut, and a flawless blow-dry that leaves hair sleek and stylish.

Or, opt for a revitalizing MILBON shampoo and conditioning treatment that delivers instant softness and shine, followed by a professional blow-dry. Either way, customers will leave feeling pampered, refreshed, and ready to show off their silky, smooth locks!

What We Offer

  • Haircut, Deep Conditioning Treatment, and Blow Dry

    Shampoo, MILBON Japanese deep conditioning treatment and haircut, followed by blow dry.
  • One Conditioning Treatment, with Blow-Dry

    MILBON, Japanese shampoo, and treatment. This delivers an instant and soft, smooth feel to the hair. Blow Dry afterward.

For these deals we only use the highest quality products from MILBON. You can be sure that you will leave the salon satisfied with your results.

Please see the below image for estimated lengths of short, medium, and long hair. ?

Why You Should Grab The Offer

Harumi Salon offers a premier hair experience with a team of highly-trained professional stylists who are dedicated to making every client look and feel their best. Known for their expertise in top-quality hair services, the salon uses premium products like MILBON to deliver exceptional results that stand the test of time. Whether you're looking for a simple trim or a total transformation, the stylists at Harumi Salon ensure personalized care in a welcoming atmosphere.

With a 4.8-star rating on Groupon backed by over 1,000 glowing reviews, the salons reputation for customer satisfaction is undeniable. Clients can expect hair-smoothing treatments designed to keep their locks looking sleek and polished long after their visit. Harumi Salon is committed to delivering an experience that leaves everyone feeling confident and refreshed, making it the go-to destination for hair care.

Eligibility & Restrictions

This Deal is for New Customers Only!

review_quotes.text: Harumi , Don’t be discouraged at first glance salon isn’t high end it’s very simple but it’s magnificent.  Harumi is such a very beautiful person . She was amazing . I nicknamed her magical hands. She did awesome with my difficult hair. My hair was very dry due to hair coloring & cancer treatment. I came out with beautifully soft hair . I luv it. Thank you Harumi ❤️
review_quotes.author: Yvette

review_quotes.text: ❤️At first glance the salon is simple nothing fancy . That didn’t matter whatsoever service is great. Hurami was amazing . I felt comfortable. She  Very polite & sweet. She was gentle . She  didn’t wash my hair ruff & didn’t burn my ear or scalp like other Dominican hair salons do. My hair was so soft . She gave me what I came in for. Im getting cancer treatment & my hairs been dry & a mess , she made it look fantastic . I will definitely come back ❤️❤️❤️
review_quotes.author: Yvette

review_quotes.text:
Harumi was great! I purchased a Groupon and texted her for an appointment and was seen a few days later. She rents a chair in a salon and it was pretty easy to find. Note that if you purchased the group, there's a $4 sales tax which she mentioned when I texted her about booking an appointment.

She listened to what I wanted and was quick, thorough, and took the time to blowout my hair and I was done in 45 minutes! I'm happy with my results and I'd definitely recommend. She takes venmo for tip an
review_quotes.author: Catrina

review_quotes.text: Harumi is warm and funny. She made me feel very comfortable and understood exactly what I was looking for in a hairstyle. She uses top products and produced a fantastic result!
review_quotes.author: Robin

review_quotes.text: Perfect! Easy to book, she was very nice and did a great job.
review_quotes.author: Guest
